components.description: List of component IDs in this block
components.title: Components

BoardConfig.description: Legacy board configuration — kept for backward compatibility.
BoardConfig.title: BoardConfig

BoardConstraints.description:
Manufacturing constraints for the PCB.

Defaults target JLCPCB 2-layer 1oz standard capability.
Supply a fab-profile override for different manufacturers.

default_trace_signal.description: Default trace width for signal nets (mm)
default_trace_signal.title: Default Trace Signal

default_trace_power.description: Default trace width for power nets (mm)
default_trace_power.title: Default Trace Power

BoardConstraints.title: BoardConstraints

outline.description: Board outline polygon vertices (x, y) in mm
outline.title: Outline

BoardToBoardConnector.description: A connector bridging two PCBs in a multi-board system.

board_a.description: Board ID of the first board
board_a.title: Board A

board_b.description: Board ID of the second board
board_b.title: Board B

pin_count.description: Number of pins/signals crossing this connector
pin_count.title: Pin Count

signals.description: List of signal names crossing the connector
signals.title: Signals

BoardToBoardConnector.title: BoardToBoardConnector

CableHarness.description: A wire/cable harness connecting points within or across boards.

wire_count.description: Number of conductors in the harness
wire_count.title: Wire Count

CableHarness.title: CableHarness

Component.description: A physical component (part) placed on the PCB.

pins.description: Pin dictionary, keyed by pin name
pins.title: Pins

position.description: Component position on board (x, y) in mm
position.title: Position

dnp.description: Do not populate flag (for BOM filtering)
dnp.title: Dnp

variants.description: Variant population overrides; keyed by variant name
variants.title: Variants

basic_part.description: Whether the part is a JLCPCB basic part
basic_part.title: Basic Part

alternates.description: Alternate/substitute MPNs that are functionally equivalent
alternates.title: Alternates

distributor_links.description: Distributor name → part URL or SKU (e.g. {'Digi-Key': 'RMCF0402FT10K0CT-ND'})
distributor_links.title: Distributor Links

price_usd.description: Unit price in USD at last supply-chain refresh
price_usd.title: Price Usd

supply_fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last supply-chain data refresh
supply_fetched_at.title: Supply Fetched At

Component.title: Component

CopperPourArea.description:
A copper pour (flood fill) region on a PCB layer.

Stores the polygon outline of the pour area, plus any cutout
(keepout) regions, thermal-relief pads, and stitching-via positions.

net_id.description: Net ID connected to this pour
net_id.title: Net Id

polygon.description: Pour outline polygon vertices (x, y) in mm
polygon.title: Polygon

stitching_vias.description: Stitching via positions (x, y) in mm
stitching_vias.title: Stitching Vias

CopperPourArea.title: CopperPourArea

DRCResult.description: Complete DRC result for a design.

design_name.description: Design name this result belongs to [computed-only]
design_name.title: Design Name

DRCResult.title: DRCResult

rule_id.description: DRC rule identifier that was violated
rule_id.title: Rule Id

name.description: Design name, used as the primary identifier
name.title: Name

DrawCommand.description: A single drawing primitive for symbols and footprints.

type.description: Primitive type: line, rect, circle, arc, text, polygon
type.title: Type

params.description: Geometry parameters (x, y, width, height, etc.)
params.title: Params

DrawCommand.title: DrawCommand

EnclosureDef.description: Mechanical enclosure definition for the product.

external_dimensions_mm.description: Enclosure outer dimensions (width, depth, height) in mm
external_dimensions_mm.title: External Dimensions Mm

internal_dimensions_mm.description: Enclosure internal cavity dimensions (width, depth, height) in mm
internal_dimensions_mm.title: Internal Dimensions Mm

antenna_window.description: Description of any antenna window or RF-transparent region
antenna_window.title: Antenna Window

step_file_url.description: URL to the STEP/3D model file
step_file_url.title: Step File Url

notes.description: Free-form design notes for the enclosure
notes.title: Notes

EnclosureDef.title: EnclosureDef

pads.description: List of pads in the footprint
pads.title: Pads

height.description: Component height above board in mm
height.title: Height

thermal_pads.description: List of pad IDs that are thermal pads
thermal_pads.title: Thermal Pads

HierarchySheet.description: A single schematic sheet within a hierarchical or multi-board design.

parent_id.description: Parent sheet ID (None for the top-level sheet in a hierarchy)
parent_id.title: Parent Id

component_ids.description: Component IDs whose schematic symbols live on this sheet
component_ids.title: Component Ids

annotation.description: Free-form annotation for this sheet (e.g. 'handles USB power delivery')
annotation.title: Annotation

HierarchySheet.title: HierarchySheet

ImportLossRecord.description:
Record of data that was silently degraded or dropped during an import.

Importers must never silently discard source data; every unsupported construct
must be recorded so downstream tools can report exactly what was degraded.

field_path.description: Dotted path to the field or record that was affected (e.g. 'nets[2].constraints.creepage')
field_path.title: Field Path

behavior.description: Import behavior for this record: 'preserve', 'warn', 'degrade', or 'reject'
behavior.title: Behavior

original_value.description: String representation of the original source value before degradation
original_value.title: Original Value

degraded_value.description: String representation of the degraded value that was kept, if any
degraded_value.title: Degraded Value

note.description: Human-readable explanation of why the data was degraded
note.title: Note

ImportLossRecord.title: ImportLossRecord

LayerSpec.description: Definition of a single PCB layer.
LayerSpec.title: LayerSpec

ManufacturingIntent.description: Manufacturing profile and profile-derived constraint intent.
ManufacturingIntent.title: ManufacturingIntent

ManufacturingRecord.description:
Manufacturing-process data for PCB fabrication and assembly.

Covers fab profile parameters, drill data, annular ring, solder mask,
paste, assembly notes, and panelization. Each record is tied to a
specific fab profile.
ManufacturingRecord.title: ManufacturingRecord

MountingHole.description: A mounting hole in the PCB.

position.description: Hole center position (x, y) in mm
position.title: Position

MountingHole.title: MountingHole

MultiBoardProject.description: A system-level project containing multiple PCBs, harnesses, and an enclosure.

boards.description: Board ID → path or design name mapping for each PCB in the system
boards.title: Boards

board_to_board_connectors.description: Connectors bridging boards in the system
board_to_board_connectors.title: Board To Board Connectors

cable_harnesses.description: Cable/wire harnesses used in the system
cable_harnesses.title: Cable Harnesses

MultiBoardProject.title: MultiBoardProject

Net.description: A logical net connecting two or more component pins.
Net.title: Net

NetConstraints.description: Electrical and physical constraints for a net.

impedance_target.description: Target impedance in ohms (for controlled-impedance nets)
impedance_target.title: Impedance Target

length_match_group.description: Name of the length-matching group this net belongs to
length_match_group.title: Length Match Group

max_length_mm.description: Maximum allowed trace length in mm
max_length_mm.title: Max Length Mm

diff_pair_partner.description: Net ID of the complementary signal in a differential pair
diff_pair_partner.title: Diff Pair Partner

diff_pair_gap_mm.description: Target gap between differential-pair traces in mm
diff_pair_gap_mm.title: Diff Pair Gap Mm

is_high_current.description: True when this net carries currents requiring wide traces (>500 mA typical)
is_high_current.title: Is High Current

min_trace_width_mm.description: Minimum trace width in mm for current-carrying capacity
min_trace_width_mm.title: Min Trace Width Mm

return_path_net.description: Net ID of the designated return-path net (e.g. GND under a high-speed trace)
return_path_net.title: Return Path Net

creepage_group.description: Creepage isolation group (IPC-2221); nets in different groups require clearance
creepage_group.title: Creepage Group

NetConstraints.title: NetConstraints

NetNode.description: Connection point referencing a component pin.

pin_name.description: Pin name on the referenced component
pin_name.title: Pin Name

NetNode.title: NetNode

Pad.description: A single pad in a PCB footprint.

layer.description: Layer assignment: top, bottom, all, inner

drill.description: Drill hole diameter in mm (None for SMD)
drill.title: Drill

Pad.title: Pad

Pin.description: A single pin on a component.

net.description: Net ID this pin is connected to
net.title: Net

position.description: Pin position on symbol (x, y) in mils or mm
position.title: Position

pin_function.description: Canonical pin function from datasheet (e.g. 'VCC', 'GND', 'I2C_SDA', 'BOOT0', 'USB_DP'); used for pin-function inference in ERC and synthesis
pin_function.title: Pin Function

current_domain.description: Current domain label (e.g. 'POWER_IN', 'POWER_OUT', 'SIGNAL'); drives current-budget checks
current_domain.title: Current Domain

Pin.title: Pin

PlacementIntent.description: Placement intent for components or component globs.

component.description: Component ref/id or glob, e.g. J1 or C*
component.title: Component

edge.description: Required board edge: left, right, top, bottom
edge.title: Edge

near.description: Target component pin or ref to place near
near.title: Near

PlacementIntent.title: PlacementIntent

ProvRecord.description:
Evidence / provenance record for a single agent or tool decision.

Every output artifact — a netlist, a DRC result, a synthesis plan — should
carry at least one ProvRecord so a downstream agent or human reviewer can
answer "what produced this, from what input, using which version?"

tool.description: Name of the tool or agent that produced the output
tool.title: Tool

tool_version.description: Semver or commit hash of the tool
tool_version.title: Tool Version

input_artifact_ids.description: IDs of input artifacts consumed by this step
input_artifact_ids.title: Input Artifact Ids

output_artifact_ids.description: IDs of output artifacts produced by this step
output_artifact_ids.title: Output Artifact Ids

artifact_hashes.description: artifact_id → SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact content
artifact_hashes.title: Artifact Hashes

decision_summary.description: Human-readable one-line summary of what the tool decided or produced
decision_summary.title: Decision Summary

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this step was executed
timestamp.title: Timestamp

human_approval.description: Identifier of the human approver (e.g. e-mail) if this step was signed off
human_approval.title: Human Approval

ProvRecord.title: ProvRecord

RouteResult.description: Result of the PCB routing step.

vias.description: List of via coordinates and sizes [computed-only]
vias.title: Vias

total_trace_length_mm.description: Total routed trace length in mm [computed-only]
total_trace_length_mm.title: Total Trace Length Mm

net_count.description: Total number of nets in design [computed-only]
net_count.title: Net Count

RouteResult.title: RouteResult

RoutingIntent.description: Routing intent for a net or net glob.

net.description: Net id/name/glob, e.g. USB_D* or GND
net.title: Net

differential_pair.description: Whether this net belongs to a differential pair
differential_pair.title: Differential Pair

copper_pour.description: Whether this net requests a copper pour
copper_pour.title: Copper Pour

RoutingIntent.title: RoutingIntent

SupplyRecord.description: Supply-chain data for a single part, used by the supply graph.

basic_part.description: Whether the part is a JLCPCB basic part
basic_part.title: Basic Part

stock.description: Current stock quantity at primary distributor
stock.title: Stock

price_usd.description: Unit price in USD at last refresh
price_usd.title: Price Usd

alternates.description: Alternate/substitute MPNs that are functionally equivalent
alternates.title: Alternates

distributor_links.description: Distributor name → part URL or SKU (e.g. {'Digi-Key': 'RMCF0402FT10K0CT-ND'})
distributor_links.title: Distributor Links

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last supply-chain data refresh
fetched_at.title: Fetched At

SupplyRecord.title: SupplyRecord

SymbolDef.description: Vector symbol definition for schematic rendering.

body.description: List of drawing primitives for the symbol body
body.title: Body

SymbolDef.title: SymbolDef

SymbolPin.description: Pin definition for schematic symbol rendering.

position.description: Pin position on symbol body (x, y)
position.title: Position

length.description: Pin line length in drawing units
length.title: Length

orientation.description: Pin direction: left, right, top, bottom
orientation.title: Orientation

electrical_type.description: Electrical type: input, output, bidirectional, power, passive
electrical_type.title: Electrical Type

SymbolPin.title: SymbolPin

ThermalRelief.description: Thermal relief spokes connecting a pad to a copper pour.

pad_position.description: Pad center position (x, y) in mm
pad_position.title: Pad Position

gap.description: Clearance gap between pad and pour in mm
gap.title: Gap

ThermalRelief.title: ThermalRelief

TraceSegment.description: A single trace segment on a PCB layer.

layer.description: Layer name this segment is routed on
layer.title: Layer

start.description: Segment start coordinate (x, y) in mm
start.title: Start

end.description: Segment end coordinate (x, y) in mm
end.title: End

net_id.description: Net ID this segment belongs to
net_id.title: Net Id

via.description: Whether this segment ends with a via
via.title: Via

TraceSegment.title: TraceSegment

VoltageDomainConstraint.description: Electrical voltage-domain intent for checks and agents.
VoltageDomainConstraint.title: VoltageDomainConstraint

description: Schema for ZapTrace PCB design files (v1)

components.description: Component dictionary, keyed by component ID
components.title: Components

nets.description: Net dictionary, keyed by net ID
nets.title: Nets

board_def.description: Full board definition with stackup, outline, constraints [computed-only if absent]

routing.description: Routing result with traces and vias [computed-only]

copper_pours.description: Copper pour (flood fill) areas keyed by net ID
copper_pours.title: Copper Pours

prov_records.description: Evidence / provenance records for agent and tool decisions
prov_records.title: Prov Records

import_losses.description: Records of data silently degraded or dropped during import
import_losses.title: Import Losses

sheets.description: Schematic sheets in a hierarchical or multi-board design
sheets.title: Sheets

supply_chain.description: Supply-chain data keyed by component ID
supply_chain.title: Supply Chain

manufacturing_records.description: Manufacturing process records for fab/assembly profiles used
manufacturing_records.title: Manufacturing Records

enclosure.description: Mechanical enclosure definition for the product

multi_board.description: Multi-board project reference (links multiple PCBs into a system)

title: ZapTrace Design
